Your Will.
Executed.

Hold a button. Say what needs doing.
Your agent handles the rest. Pucky lives on your Razr's front screen — always ready, never in the way. Connected to hundreds of your apps. Remembers everything. Works while you don't. Get Early Access See How It Works
The Protocol

Three Motions. Infinite Reach.

I
Hold Volume Up

Flip open your Razr, hold the volume key. Your agent is on the front screen — no unlock, no navigation.

II
Say What You Need

Send an email. Book a table. Pull a report. Schedule work. Speak it once in plain language.

III
Walk Away

The agent executes across your connected apps on a cloud VM. Results arrive. You're already onto the next thing.

What It Does

Everything You'd Delegate
to Someone Exceptional

01
Act Across Your Apps

Connected to hundreds of tools via Composio — Gmail, Notion, Slack, GitHub, Sheets, Linear, and more.

02
Remember Everything

Context that persists. Your agent knows your preferences, history, and ongoing work — so you never repeat yourself.

03
Schedule & Automate

Weekly reports, daily digests, recurring tasks — your agent runs them on time, every time.

04
No Technical Setup

Sideload the APK. Pair with your VM. Start talking. No code, no config, no infrastructure to manage.

The work is handled. Breathe.
